name: Floral Wrap Midi Dress
description: A breezy wrap-style midi dress featuring an all-over floral print. Adjustable tie waist, V-neckline, and flutter sleeves make it perfect for brunches and casual outings.

name: Linen Slip Dress
description: Minimalist linen-blend slip dress with adjustable spaghetti straps and a relaxed A-line silhouette. Lightweight and breathable for warm days.

name: Bodycon Bandage Dress
description: Form-fitting ribbed bandage dress with a square neckline and ruched side detail. A go-to for evening events and parties.

name: Tiered Boho Maxi Dress
description: Flowy tiered maxi dress in a relaxed bohemian style. Features elastic smocked bodice, puff sleeves, and a hem with lace trim.

name: Shirt Dress with Belt
description: Classic shirt dress crafted from crisp cotton. Button-down front, chest pockets, and a matching waist belt give it a structured yet relaxed look.

name: Cut-Out Bodycon Mini
description: Stretchy knit mini dress with tasteful cut-outs at the waist. Scoop neckline and thick straps for comfortable wear at clubs and late-night events.

name: Smocked Sundress
description: Lightweight sundress with a fully smocked bodice, ruffled hem, and adjustable straps. Pairs beautifully with sandals and a straw hat.

name: Off-Shoulder Ruffle Dress
description: Romantic off-shoulder dress with a cascading ruffle along the neckline and a midi-length layered skirt. Great for festivals and beach weddings.

name: Blazer Dress
description: Structured blazer-style mini dress with double-breasted gold buttons and lapel collar. Ideal for business casual and smart-formal occasions.

name: Denim Shirt Dress
description: Casual denim shirt dress with a relaxed fit, button-through front, and frayed hem. Wear it open over leggings or cinched at the waist.

name: Satin Slip Party Dress
description: Luxe satin midi slip dress with a bias cut and adjustable thin straps. Effortlessly transitions from day to evening with the right accessories.

name: Puff Sleeve Mini Dress
description: Playful mini dress with exaggerated puff sleeves and a square neckline. Elasticated cuffs and relaxed flare skirt keep it comfortable and cute.

name: Asymmetric Hem Dress
description: Contemporary dress with a high-low asymmetric hemline and a sleeveless silhouette. Features a mock neck and a back zip closure.

name: Polo Knit Dress
description: Sporty-chic polo dress in soft knit fabric with a button-front placket, collar, and rolled short sleeves. Great for athleisure and country club aesthetics.

name: Zimmermann-Inspired Lace Dress
description: Delicate lace midi dress with a fitted waist, scalloped hem, and spaghetti straps. Semi-sheer overlay adds romantic elegance.

name: Oversized Graphic Tee
description: 100% cotton boxy graphic tee with vintage-inspired print. Dropped shoulders and a relaxed fit make it an effortless everyday wardrobe staple.

name: Cropped Linen Shirt
description: Lightweight cropped linen shirt with a relaxed collar, roll-up sleeves, and a front button closure. Knot it at the hem or tuck it in.

name: Ribbed Crop Cami
description: Snug ribbed knit cami with adjustable straps and a scoop neckline. Layer it under blazers or wear solo with high-waisted jeans.

name: Bardot Off-Shoulder Top
description: Flirty Bardot-style top with elasticated off-shoulder neckline and a ruffled trim. Made from soft crepe fabric.

name: Peplum Blouse
description: Fitted peplum blouse with subtle flare at the hem. Concealed back zipper, cinched waist, and a V-neckline for a polished silhouette.

name: Sheer Organza Blouse
description: Ethereal sheer organza top with a high neck and long sleeves. Delicate button detailing at back. Perfect over a bralette for fashion-forward looks.

name: Bralette with Underwire
description: Supportive bralette crafted from soft microfibre with underwire support and adjustable straps. Dual-purpose top and inner wear.

name: Knotted Tie-Front Top
description: Breezy woven top with a front knot and flutter sleeves. Relaxed neckline and an easy pull-on style ideal for vacations and weekend wear.

name: Sequin Party Top
description: All-over sequin embellished camisole top with scoop neck and a cropped length. The life of the party paired with tailored trousers.

name: Striped Boatneck Top
description: Classic French Riviera-inspired striped top with a wide boatneck and three-quarter length sleeves. Soft cotton-modal blend.

name: Corset Boning Top
description: Structured satin corset top with boning, sweetheart neckline, and adjustable lace-up back. Instantly elevates any look.

name: Flowy Chiffon Blouse
description: Draped chiffon blouse with a loose silhouette and tie at the neckline. A versatile office-to-evening wardrobe staple.

name: Muscle Tee
description: Effortlessly casual muscle tee with deep armholes and a slightly cropped length. Made from soft jersey fabric.

name: Wrap Blouse
description: V-neck wrap blouse with adjustable waist ties and long sleeves with a subtle flare at the cuff. Polished enough for the office.

name: Ruched Satin Cami
description: Satin camisole with central ruching and adjustable straps. Versatile enough to be worn tucked into trousers or layered under a blazer.

name: High-Waist Straight Leg Jeans
description: Classic high-rise straight-leg jeans in rigid denim. Five-pocket styling, raw hem, and a zip-fly closure. A wardrobe essential.

name: Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Flowy wide-leg trousers in a smooth crepe fabric. High-rise waist, side pockets, and a hook-and-eye closure. Effortlessly sophisticated.

name: Mini Pleated Skirt
description: Y2K-inspired mini pleated skirt with a wide waistband and button-tab front. Pairs well with fitted crop tops and platform sneakers.

name: Flare Yoga Pants
description: High-waist flare yoga pants in buttery-soft 4-way stretch fabric. Flat waistband with no-roll technology and hidden waistband pocket.

name: Midi Wrap Skirt
description: Versatile wrap skirt in lightweight crepe. Adjustable tie waist, midi length, and a slight slit at the hem. Easy to style up or down.

name: Cigarette Trousers
description: Slim cigarette-cut trousers with a high waist, clean front, and a cropped ankle length. A polished office staple in structured fabric.

name: Cargo Pants
description: Relaxed-fit cargo pants with multiple side pockets, elasticised ankle cuffs, and a drawstring waist. The ultimate street-style staple.

name: Leather Mini Skirt
description: Faux leather A-line mini skirt with a back-zip closure and a subtle flare. An edgy, fashion-forward piece for nights out.

name: Jogger Pants
description: Cosy French terry jogger pants with a tapered fit, elasticized waistband, and ribbed ankle cuffs. Perfect for lounging and errands.

name: Broderie Anglaise Skirt
description: Floaty midi skirt in white broderie anglaise cotton with a scalloped hem and elasticised waist. Ideal for summer and beach holidays.

name: Slit Maxi Skirt
description: Elegant maxi skirt with a floor-length silhouette, high front slit, and elasticated waistband. Satin-finish fabric gives a luxe look.

name: Mom Jeans
description: Relaxed high-rise mom jeans with a tapered leg and light wash finish. Features a five-pocket design and a zip-button closure.

name: Linen Shorts
description: Relaxed linen shorts with a wide waistband, front pleat, and side pockets. Breathable and stylish for hot days.

name: Bike Shorts
description: High-waist compression bike shorts with flatlock seams for chafe-free wear. Suitable for gym, cycling, and casual street styling.

name: Palazzo Pants
description: Fluid palazzo pants with an extra-wide leg, elasticated waist, and lightweight georgette fabric. Comfortable, airy, and deeply elegant.

name: Floral Co-ord Set — Top
description: Part of PRD-046/PRD-047 floral co-ord set. Top features a halter neck, smocked back, and a cropped length. Bright botanical print on lightweight cotton.

name: Floral Co-ord Set — Skirt
description: Part of PRD-046/PRD-047 floral co-ord set. Midi wrap skirt in matching botanical print with an elasticised waist and a subtle side slit.

name: Linen Co-ord Set — Blazer
description: Part of PRD-048/PRD-049 linen co-ord. Oversized linen blazer with notched lapels, two front pockets, and a single button closure. Great for smart-casual office days.

name: Linen Co-ord Set — Shorts
description: Part of PRD-048/PRD-049 linen co-ord. Tailored linen shorts with a high-rise waistband and side pockets, matching the blazer perfectly.

name: Printed Satin Co-ord — Top
description: Part of PRD-050/PRD-051 satin co-ord. Bias-cut satin cami top in a luxe abstract print. Scooped back and adjustable straps.

name: Printed Satin Co-ord — Trousers
description: Part of PRD-050/PRD-051 satin co-ord. Wide-leg satin trousers in matching abstract print with elasticated waist and clean drape.

name: Sporty Co-ord — Sports Bra
description: Part of PRD-052/PRD-053 sporty co-ord. Medium-support sports bra in moisture-wicking fabric with a racerback silhouette.

name: Sporty Co-ord — Leggings
description: Part of PRD-052/PRD-053 sporty co-ord. High-waist full-length leggings in matching moisture-wicking fabric with phone pocket.

name: Striped Knit Co-ord — Crop Top
description: Part of PRD-054/PRD-055 knit co-ord. Ribbed knit striped crop top with a square neckline and short sleeves.

name: Striped Knit Co-ord — Midi Skirt
description: Part of PRD-054/PRD-055 knit co-ord. Ribbed midi skirt in matching stripe pattern, with an elasticated waistband and relaxed fit.

name: Utility Co-ord — Jacket
description: Part of PRD-056/PRD-057 utility co-ord. Oversized utility jacket with multiple cargo pockets, hood, and zip-button closure in durable cotton twill.

name: Utility Co-ord — Cargo Shorts
description: Part of PRD-056/PRD-057 utility co-ord. Matching cargo shorts with side pockets, drawstring waist, and a relaxed fit.

name: Velvet Co-ord — Off-Shoulder Top
description: Part of PRD-058/PRD-059 velvet co-ord. Stretch velvet off-shoulder top with a ruched bust and short cropped length.

name: Velvet Co-ord — Wide Leg Pants
description: Part of PRD-058/PRD-059 velvet co-ord. Matching stretch velvet wide-leg trousers with a high-rise elasticated waist.

name: Denim Co-ord — Trucker Jacket
description: Part of PRD-060/PRD-061 denim co-ord. Classic trucker jacket in rigid denim with chest pockets, button front, and a slightly cropped length.

name: Denim Co-ord — Mini Skirt
description: Part of PRD-060/PRD-061 denim co-ord. Matching denim mini skirt with five-pocket design and raw frayed hem.

name: Monochrome Suit Set — Blazer
description: Part of PRD-062/PRD-063 power suit. Oversized single-button blazer in structured crepe with peak lapels and padded shoulders.

name: Monochrome Suit Set — Trousers
description: Part of PRD-062/PRD-063 power suit. Wide-leg tailored trousers in matching structured crepe with a zip-fly and front pleat.

name: Boho Print Co-ord — Smocked Top
description: Part of PRD-064/PRD-065 boho co-ord. Smocked off-shoulder top in vivid paisley print viscose.

name: Boho Print Co-ord — Flared Pants
description: Part of PRD-064/PRD-065 boho co-ord. Flared wide-leg pants in matching paisley print viscose with elasticated waist.

name: Checks Co-ord — Blazer
description: Part of PRD-066/PRD-067 checks co-ord. Classic windowpane-check oversized blazer with a relaxed fit.

name: Checks Co-ord — Mini Skirt
description: Part of PRD-066/PRD-067 checks co-ord. A-line mini skirt in matching windowpane-check fabric with pleated design.

name: Tropical Co-ord — Button-Down Shirt
description: Part of PRD-068/PRD-069 tropical co-ord. Relaxed button-down shirt in vibrant tropical floral print. Can be worn open As a coverup.

name: Tropical Co-ord — Shorts
description: Part of PRD-068/PRD-069 tropical co-ord. Matching tropical print high-waist shorts with elasticated waistband and side pockets.

name: Loungewear Co-ord — Oversized Hoodie
description: Part of PRD-070/PRD-071 loungewear co-ord. Oversized fleece hoodie with dropped shoulders, front kangaroo pocket, and a drawstring hood.

name: Loungewear Co-ord — Joggers
description: Part of PRD-070/PRD-071 loungewear co-ord. Matching fleece joggers with elasticised waist, ribbed cuffs, and side pockets.

name: Knit Tank Co-ord — Tank
description: Part of PRD-072/PRD-073 knit tank co-ord. Fitted ribbed knit tank top with a square neckline.

name: Knit Tank Co-ord — Mini Skirt
description: Part of PRD-072/PRD-073 knit tank co-ord. Matching fitted ribbed mini skirt with side slit and elasticated waist.

name: Cotton Candy Co-ord — Crop Jacket
description: Part of PRD-074/PRD-075. Pastel cropped jacket in soft scuba fabric with a zip front and clean seam detailing.

name: Cotton Candy Co-ord — Bike Shorts
description: Part of PRD-074/PRD-075. Matching pastel high-waist bike shorts in scuba fabric with flatlock seams.
